title: Centralize Reusable Metric Detail Card Component
description:
Refactors the metric detail card into a standalone, reusable Blade component that can be included across multiple pages: Metrics, Reports & Dashboards, and Object Dictionary.

The component accepts configurable arguments:
- metric_id (int, required)
- add_alias_trigger (yes/null) — auto-opens the alias form
- get_metric_report_trigger (yes/null) — auto-opens the report tab
- showvisualize (true/false) — shows/hides the Visualize Metrics Map option
- editoption (true/false) — shows/hides pencil edit icons

Usage: include 'components.metric-offcanvas-component' and call load_general_info_offcanvas(metric_id, ...) from JavaScript.
acceptance_criteria: Metric detail card is abstracted into a reusable Blade component
Component works on Metrics, Reports & Dashboards, and Dictionary pages
metric_id, showvisualize, editoption, add_alias_trigger, get_metric_report_trigger arguments are supported
One consistent card component used across the app
middleware_changes: Metric detail card extracted into a Blade component (metric-offcanvas-component) with configurable arguments and a JavaScript API.
implementation_notes: Component is included via @include('components.metric-offcanvas-component'). JS function load_general_info_offcanvas() accepts metric_id plus optional arguments for alias trigger, report trigger, visualize toggle, and edit toggle.
comment_summary: Developer centralized the card and documented the usage API with argument descriptions. Integrated on the Reports & Dashboards page — clicking a linked metric name opens the full metric detail sidebar.
